summary: Completed comprehensive testing of upgraded AI-based landing page builder. All core features working correctly including enhanced AI generation (8+ sections, 40+ elements), form generation, JSON upload, and builder functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (GET /api/)
Backend AI generation: 9 sections, 47 elements (exceeds 8+ sections, 40+ elements requirement)
Backend form generation: Successfully generates form elements when 'form' or 'feedback' mentioned in prompt
Backend CORS headers properly configured
Frontend prompt page loads with all required form fields
Frontend Page Type selector functional
Frontend Target Audience field accessible
Frontend Product/Service Name field accessible
Frontend Product/Service Description field accessible
Frontend Additional Requirements field accessible
Frontend 'Upload Landing Page JSON' button visible and functional
Frontend 'Generate Landing Page' button visible and functional
AI generation flow: Form submission triggers loading indicator
AI generation flow: Successfully navigates to builder after generation
AI generation: Generated 9 sections with 46 elements in builder
JSON upload flow: sample-page.json successfully imported
JSON upload: Successfully navigates to builder after import
JSON import: Imported 5 sections with 28 elements from Zoho hierarchical format
Builder canvas loads correctly after both AI generation and JSON import
Element selectability: Clicking elements works correctly
Properties panel appears with editing controls when elements selected
Preview mode functionality: Successfully toggles between edit and preview modes
Builder toolbar functionality: Preview and back-to-builder navigation works
